name: Fleet Management
description: Vehicles, compliance (MOT/tax/insurance), VDI at /VDIs, dynamic inspection forms, issue kanban, VIN/ID photos, auto VOR on expired compliance, employee portal Fleet link.
changelog: Initial fleet plugin: schema, dashboard, vehicles, driver portal, JSON API.
